heading: Obsolete ordnance: gift to State homes for soldiers and sailors
label: 7686 Obsolete ordnance: gift to State homes for soldiers and sailors
text: Subject to regulations under , the Secretary of the Army may give not more than two obsolete bronze or iron cannons suitable for firing salutes to any home for soldiers or sailors established and maintained under State authority.section 121 of title 40
